title: ligularia ianthochaeta
intro: Ligularia ianthochaeta, also known as Golden Ray, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to China and Japan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ligularia ianthochaeta include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in herbal infusions to leverage its medicinal properties.
